title: Verify access
heading: Enter the management workbench
description: Complete browser auth for the current SeaLantern instance to continue.
login_description: Sign in with the current browser password for this instance.
setup_description: Provide the setup token and set the browser password.
recovery_description: Provide the recovery token and set a new browser password.
setup_token_help: This token is only used for first-time browser password setup.
recovery_token_help: This token is only used for the active recovery reset flow.
password_help: A successful verification stores a browser session.
new_password_help: A successful reset immediately issues a new browser session.
remember_help: Only use this on fixed admin devices.
message_password_invalid: The password is invalid. Enter it again.
message_setup_failed: Setup failed. Check the setup token and try again.
message_recovery_failed: Recovery reset failed. Check the recovery token and try again.
message_saved_credential_invalid: The saved credential is no longer valid. Enter it again.
message_session_invalid: The session token is invalid. Verify again.
message_unreachable: Unable to reach the current instance.
message_session_expired: The current session expired. Verify again.
